# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: SQS Queue and SNS Topic setup for serverless event processing architecture

Parameters:
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: dev
    AllowedValues:
      - dev
      - staging
      - prod
    Description: Environment name
  
  MessageRetentionPeriod:
    Type: Number
    Default: 345600
    MinValue: 60
    MaxValue: 1209600
    Description: Message retention period in seconds (default 4 days)
  
  VisibilityTimeout:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 43200
    Description: Visibility timeout in seconds
  
  MaxMessageSize:
    Type: Number
    Default: 262144
    MinValue: 1024
    MaxValue: 262144
    Description: Maximum message size in bytes (default 256 KB)
  
  ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds:
    Type: Number
    Default: 0
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 20
    Description: Long polling wait time in seconds

Resources:
  EventProcessingQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub ${Environment}-event-processing-queue
      MessageRetentionPeriod: !Ref MessageRetentionPeriod
      VisibilityTimeout: !Ref VisibilityTimeout
      MaximumMessageSize: !Ref MaxMessageSize
      ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds: !Ref ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds
      DelaySeconds: 0
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sqs
      KmsDataKeyReusePeriodSeconds: 300
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Application
          Value: EventProcessing
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  EventProcessingDeadLetterQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub ${Environment}-event-processing-dlq
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sqs
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Application
          Value: EventProcessing
        - Key: Type
          Value: DeadLetterQueue
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  EventProcessingQueueWithDLQ:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    DependsOn: EventProcessingDeadLetterQueue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub ${Environment}-event-processing-queue-with-dlq
      MessageRetentionPeriod: !Ref MessageRetentionPeriod
      VisibilityTimeout: !Ref VisibilityTimeout
      MaximumMessageSize: !Ref MaxMessageSize
      ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds: !Ref ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sqs
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt EventProcessingDeadLetterQueue.Arn
        maxReceiveCount: 3
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Application
          Value: EventProcessing
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  EventProcessingTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub ${Environment}-event-processing-topic
      DisplayName: Event Processing Topic
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sns
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Application
          Value: EventProcessing
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  EventProcessingQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref EventProcessingQueue
        - !Ref EventProcessingQueueWithDLQ
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowSNSPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
              - !GetAtt EventProcessingQueueWithDLQ.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Ref EventProcessingTopic
          - Sid: AllowQueueOperations
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
              - sqs:GetQueueUrl
              - sqs:ChangeMessageVisibility
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
              - !GetAtt EventProcessingQueueWithDLQ.Arn

  SNSTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref EventProcessingTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowPublishFromAccount
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root
            Action:
              - SNS:Publish
              - SNS:Subscribe
              - SNS:ListSubscriptionsByTopic
              - SNS:GetTopicAttributes
            Resource: !Ref EventProcessingTopic
          - Sid: AllowPublishFromServices
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - events.amazonaws.com
                - lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - SNS:Publish
            Resource: !Ref EventProcessingTopic

  QueueSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Protocol: sqs
      TopicArn: !Ref EventProcessingTopic
      Endpoint: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueueWithDLQ.Arn
      RawMessageDelivery: true

  FIFOQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub ${Environment}-event-processing-queue.fifo
      FifoQueue: true
      ContentBasedDeduplication: true
      DeduplicationScope: messageGroup
      FifoThroughputLimit: perMessageGroupId
      MessageRetentionPeriod: !Ref MessageRetentionPeriod
      VisibilityTimeout: !Ref VisibilityTimeout
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sqs
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Application
          Value: EventProcessing
        - Key: Type
          Value: FIFO
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  FIFOTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub ${Environment}-event-processing-topic.fifo
      DisplayName: Event Processing FIFO Topic
      FifoTopic: true
      ContentBasedDeduplication: true
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sns
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Application
          Value: EventProcessing
        - Key: Type
          Value: FIFO
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

Outputs:
  EventProcessingQueueURL:
    Description: URL of the Event Processing Queue
    Value: !Ref EventProcessingQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${Environment}-EventProcessingQueueURL

  EventProcessingQueueARN:
    Description: ARN of the Event Processing Queue
    Value: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${Environment}-EventProcessingQueueARN

  EventProcessingQueueWithDLQURL:
    Description: URL of the Event Processing Queue with DLQ
    Value: !Ref EventProcessingQueueWithDLQ
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${Environment}-EventProcessingQueueWithDLQURL

  EventProcessingQueueWithDLQARN:
    Description: ARN of the Event Processing Queue with DLQ
    Value: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueueWithDLQ.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${Environment}-EventProcessingQueueWithDLQARN

  DeadLetterQueueURL:
    Description: URL of the Dead Letter Queue
    Value: !Ref EventProcessingDeadLetterQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${Environment}-EventProcessingDLQURL

  DeadLetterQueueARN:
    Description: ARN of the Dead Letter Queue
    Value: !GetAtt EventProcessingDeadLetterQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${Environment}-EventProcessingDLQARN

  EventProcessingTopicARN:
    Description: ARN of the Event Processing Topic
    Value: !Ref EventProcessingTopic
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${Environment}-EventProcessingTopicARN

  FIFOQueueURL:
    Description: URL of the FIFO Queue
    Value: !Ref FIFOQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${Environment}-EventProcessingFIFOQueueURL

  FIFOQueueARN:
    Description: ARN of the FIFO Queue
    Value: !GetAtt FIFOQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${Environment}-EventProcessingFIFOQueueARN

  FIFOTopicARN:
    Description: ARN of the FIFO Topic
    Value: !Ref FIFOTopic
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${Environment}-EventProcessingFIFOTopicARN
